title: 冥海缒幽
theme: 民国·深海潜艇密室命案
synopsis: 1914年10月，新型潜艇「铁鲸号」载着六人从毗海村出发，前往太平洋深海首航。数日潜行后，潜艇被困海底无法上浮，船员接连死亡——在与世隔绝的铁棺材中，五位各怀秘密的乘客必须在氧气耗尽前找出真凶，找到逃生之路。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Chinese submarine, deep ocean, dim yellow electric lights, iron corridors, portholes showing dark abyss, claustrophobic atmosphere, oil painting style

cover.prompt: 1914 Chinese submarine interior, dim yellow lights, iron corridor with porthole showing deep dark ocean, mysterious atmosphere, oil painting style
